mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20d returns occur in less than 50% of low-rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 8.5 percent, consumer spending power collapses and corporate earnings forecasts are downgraded, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in more than 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 8.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts signal broad-based consumer demand expansion, driving corporate revenue growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60d returns with a statistical significance level of p less than 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the index of industrial production reflects immediate supply-side momentum that triggers algorithmic buying and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO changes yield negative 5d returns in more than 55% of observations during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 225, inflation expectations force market participants to price in tighter future monetary policy, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in more than 65% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 225.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a decline in the unemployment rate confirm robust labor market tightening, boosting consumer confidence and yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to produce a positive rank correlation with 60d forward returns over any 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product confirms macroeconomic expansion, prompting immediate portfolio rebalancing into equities and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth rates coincide with negative 5d SPX returns in more than 50% of quarterly release windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the industrial production index falls below 90, manufacturing contraction signals impending corporate earnings declines, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 20d returns in more than 60% of periods where INDPRO remains below 90.
